views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's commute stats, weekly average comparison ring, streak counter, and a quick-add floating button. Top section highlights last commute duration vs personal average with a delta badge. Middle section shows a mini week bar chart of daily totals. Bottom shows best route suggestion based on historical data.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-log modal optimized for speed. Direction toggle at top (to/from work), large duration stepper as hero input, transport mode horizontal scroll pills, route name with recent-route suggestions dropdown, traffic level segmented control, optional cost and stress slider collapsed behind 'More Details' disclosure. Pre-fills departure time to now.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Scrollable date-grouped list of all commute entries. Each row shows direction icon, duration, route, transport mode badge, and traffic indicator dot. Filter bar at top lets user filter by direction, transport mode, or route name. Swipe to delete. Tap to view/edit detail.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Deep analytics with four sections: (1) Duration trend line chart for past 30 days with 7-day moving average overlay, (2) Day-of-week heatmap showing average commute by weekday, (3) Route comparison bar chart ranking routes by average duration, (4) Computed insights cards — fastest route, worst traffic day, monthly time/cost totals, stress correlation with duration, and week-over-week trend.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCommutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All commute entries logged today, sorted by departure time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for all entries today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily total commute minutes over the current week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekAverageMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily total commute minutes from the previous week for trend comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendPercentage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in weekly average vs previous week; negative means improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive calendar days with at least one commute logged, counting back from today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: fastestCommuteAllTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entry with the shortest duration across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageByDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average commute duration grouped by weekday (Mon-Fri), used for day-of-week heatmap

viewModelComputedProperties.name: routeRankings
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All routes ranked by average duration with usage count, for route comparison chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyTotalHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total commute hours spent this calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of cost field for all entries this calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction 0.0-1.0 of today's commute vs target max duration; below 1.0 means under target

viewModelComputedProperties.name: durationChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily total commute minutes for the past 30 days, used for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: transportModeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage split of transport modes used across all entries this month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageStressByTraffic
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average stress rating grouped by traffic level, reveals stress-traffic correlation

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of computed insight strings: best day to commute, fastest route, time saved this week, cost trend, stress pattern, optimal departure window

dailyGoal.description: Target maximum round-trip commute time per day in minutes. Progress ring shows actual vs target — green when under, yellow at 80-100%, red when exceeded. User-configurable in settings with default of 60 minutes.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if the user logged at least one commute entry (either direction) on that calendar day. Weekends are excluded from streak calculation — a Friday entry followed by a Monday entry preserves the streak. Holidays are treated as weekends.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: 7-day rolling average of daily total commute minutes compared to the previous 7-day window. Secondary trends: (1) week-over-week cost comparison, (2) month-over-month average duration, (3) per-route average duration over last 10 uses vs overall average for that route. Trend direction indicated by up/down arrow with percentage and color coding (green = improving/shorter, red = worsening/longer).
insights: Best Commute Day: Identifies which weekday historically has the shortest average commute and recommends scheduling flexibility around it
Fastest Route: Compares all named routes by average duration and highlights the statistically fastest with confidence based on sample size
Optimal Departure Window: Analyzes departure times vs duration to suggest the best 30-minute departure window for shortest commute
Weekly Time Budget: Calculates total hours spent commuting this week and projects monthly total, compares to previous month
Cost Efficiency: Computes cost-per-minute across transport modes, highlights cheapest option that stays within time target
Stress-Traffic Correlation: Flags when heavy traffic days correlate with high stress ratings, suggests alternate modes or times
Personal Record Alert: Notifies when today's commute was faster than the 30-day average by more than 20%, celebrates the win
Mode Comparison: When user has entries across multiple transport modes, compares average duration and cost to help optimize
